# OIBus

> Open source industrial data collection software — free, lightweight, and easy to deploy.

OIBus is an open source data collection agent developed and maintained by Optimistik since 2020 under
the European Union Public Licence (EUPL). It runs on Windows, Linux, macOS, and Docker. It connects to
20+ industrial and business data sources (South connectors) and forwards data to 10+ destinations
(North connectors) including cloud platforms, databases, and analytics applications.

OIBus is configured entirely through a web interface — no code required. It supports scheduled polling,
event-based subscriptions, history replay (backfill), and store-and-forward caching. It handles from 10
to 10,000+ data points per second.

## Documentation

- [Overview and concepts](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/): Architecture, South/North/Engine model, supported protocols
- [Installation](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/installation/): Windows installer, Linux service, macOS, Docker
- [First access](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/installation/first-access): Web interface walkthrough, default credentials, engine metrics
- [OIAnalytics registration](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/installation/oianalytics): Remote management, command architecture, secret encryption
- [Automated installation](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/installation/disk-image): Mass deployment via disk image and curl API

## South Connectors (Data Sources)

- [Common settings](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/common-settings): Scan modes, items, subscriptions, throttling
- [OPC UA](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/opcua): OPC UA subscriptions and history, security modes, aggregates
- [OPC Classic (DA/HDA)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/opc): OPC DA/HDA with aggregate and resampling
- [Modbus](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/modbus): Modbus TCP/RTU, coils, registers, data types
- [MQTT](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/mqtt): MQTT subscriptions, wildcard topics, QoS
- [Microsoft SQL Server](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/mssql): MSSQL queries with datetime handling
- [MySQL / MariaDB](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/mysql): MySQL queries
- [PostgreSQL](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/postgresql): PostgreSQL queries
- [Oracle Database](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/oracle): Oracle queries
- [SQLite](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/sqlite): SQLite queries
- [ODBC](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/odbc): ODBC generic SQL connector
- [OLEDB](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/oledb): OLEDB connector (Windows)
- [OSIsoft PI](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/osisoft-pi): PI Data Archive historian
- [REST API (South)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/rest): HTTP REST polling
- [OIAnalytics (South)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/south-connectors/oianalytics): Pull data from OIAnalytics

## North Connectors (Destinations)

- [Common settings](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/common-settings): Cache, throttling, errors, archive, transformers, data filtering
- [OIAnalytics (North)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/oianalytics): Send data to OIAnalytics SaaS
- [Amazon S3](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/aws-s3): Upload files to Amazon S3
- [Azure Blob Storage](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/azure-blob): Upload files to Azure Blob / Data Lake
- [MQTT (North)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/mqtt): Publish to MQTT broker
- [REST API (North)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/rest): Push data to any HTTP REST endpoint
- [SFTP](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/sftp): Upload files via SFTP
- [Modbus (North)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/modbus): Write values to Modbus devices
- [OPC UA (North)](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/opcua): Write values to OPC UA servers
- [File Writer](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/file-writer): Write files to local disk
- [Console](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/north-connectors/console): Print data to console (debugging)

## Engine

- [Engine settings](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/engine/engine-settings): Name, port, proxy server, logging parameters
- [Scan modes](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/engine/scan-modes): Cron-based scheduling for data collection
- [IP filters](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/engine/ip-filters): Restrict web interface access by IP address
- [Transformers](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/engine/transformers): Filter, modify, and convert data between South and North
- [Certificates](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/engine/certificates): TLS certificate management

## History Queries

- [History queries](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/guide/history-queries): Replay historical data from any South connector to any North connector

## API Reference

- [REST API](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/api/): Full OIBus REST API reference (OpenAPI)

## Developer

- [Developer guide](https://oibus.optimistik.com/docs/developer/): Contributing, architecture, creating new connectors

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/OptimistikSAS/OIBus): Source code, issues, releases, changelog
- [License](https://ec.europa.eu/info/european-union-public-licence_en): European Union Public Licence (EUPL)
- [Releases](https://github.com/OptimistikSAS/OIBus/releases): Download latest and previous versions
